en_title: Next Metroid Game for Switch 2 Reportedly Leaked in Age Rating From Brazilian Government
cn_title: 《密特罗德》新作疑遭巴西评级泄露，或登陆Switch 2
subtitle: 又一个Ravenous
opus_summary: 巴西司法与公共安全部的年龄评级文件疑似泄露了下一款《密特罗德》游戏《Metroid Ravenous》。IGN无法确认文件真伪，但玩家猜测它可能是《密特罗德：生存恐惧》的续作。

paragraphs.en: The Brazilian government may have leaked the next Metroid game, thanks to an age rating filed through the country’s Ministry of Justice and Public Security.
paragraphs.cn: 巴西政府可能通过该国司法与公共安全部提交的一份年龄评级，泄露了下一款《密特罗德》游戏。

paragraphs.en: The supposed rating documentation was leaked online on July 1 and swiftly deleted, but eagle-eyed gamers were quick to take screenshots. It wasn’t long before these digital snapshots went viral, making their way across forums and social media platforms within hours.
paragraphs.cn: 这份疑似评级文件于7月1日在网上泄露，并很快被删除，但眼尖的玩家迅速截下了图。没过多久，这些数字截图就在数小时内传遍论坛和社交媒体平台。

paragraphs.en: The document lists the game’s title as ‘Metroid Ravenous,’ with its year of production listed for 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 文件将游戏标题列为《Metroid Ravenous》，制作年份标注为2026年。

paragraphs.en: The intended age rating is listed as “not recommended for children under 10 years old,” but the assigned rating is “not recommended for children under 12 years of age.”
paragraphs.cn: 文件中拟定年龄评级为「不建议10岁以下儿童游玩」，但实际分配评级为「不建议12岁以下儿童游玩」。

paragraphs.en: While IGN can’t confirm the validity of this document, the screenshot’s existence is predictably sparking a massive conversation online, leaving fans equal parts excited and puzzled at the possibility of getting another Metroid game so soon after Metroid 4 Prime: Beyond, which was released in December 2025.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然IGN无法确认这份文件的有效性，但截图的存在不出意料地在网上引发了大量讨论。玩家一方面兴奋，一方面也感到困惑，因为《密特罗德Prime 4：Beyond》才在2025年12月发售，如今这么快就可能又有一款《密特罗德》游戏。

paragraphs.en: Some players are speculating that this could be a sequel to Metroid Dread , linking its name, ‘Ravenous,’ to Raven Beak, the main antagonist of that game.
paragraphs.cn: 一些玩家猜测，这可能是《密特罗德：生存恐惧》的续作，并把副标题「Ravenous」与该作主要反派Raven Beak联系起来。

paragraphs.en: Thus far, nothing else is known about the rumored title. As aforementioned, this would be the latest Metroid game following 4 Prime: Beyond, which was met with mixed reviews on launch. We gave the game an eight out of 10 stars, calling it an “excellent comeback” despite having “few underdeveloped elements that keep it from feeling as cohesive as its predecessors.”
paragraphs.cn: 到目前为止，关于这款传闻中的作品还没有其他信息。如前所述，如果属实，这将是继《密特罗德Prime 4：Beyond》之后最新的《密特罗德》游戏。后者发售时评价褒贬不一，IGN给了8/10分，称其尽管有「少数发展不足的元素，让它不如前作那样浑然一体」，但仍是一次「出色回归」。

pending_dict.note: 泄露文件中的疑似标题，暂无官方中文译名，暂保留英文。
角色名，暂无稳定中文译名，暂保留英文。
